sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54558" key="katamosxeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταμοσχ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n54558.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">propagate by suckers</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
